pi_items.source: task.json description section explicitly specifies: 'Title: Natural Earth Feature Service'

pi_items.metadata_value: Provides controlled access to Natural Earth vector datasets
pi_items.verified_value: Provides controlled access to Natural Earth vector datasets
pi_items.source: task.json description section explicitly specifies: 'Abstract: Provides controlled access to Natural Earth vector datasets'

task.json description section explicitly specifies: 'Max Features: 50'. GeoServer 2.25.2 documentation confirms maxFeatures is a standard WFS configuration parameter for limiting feature count in GetFeature responses.
task.json description specifies saving GetCapabilities response to '~/ne_wfs_capabilities.xml', which expands to '/home/ga/ne_wfs_capabilities.xml' for user 'ga'
task.json description specifies saving GetFeature response to '~/ne_countries_features.json', which expands to '/home/ga/ne_countries_features.json' for user 'ga'

privileged_info_summary: This task configures workspace-specific WFS (Web Feature Service) settings for the 'ne' workspace in GeoServer 2.25.2 using real Natural Earth geospatial data (1:110m scale shapefiles of countries, populated places, rivers, and lakes) downloaded from naciscdn.org. The expected WFS configuration specifies a custom service title of 'Natural Earth Feature Service', abstract 'Provides controlled access to Natural Earth vector datasets', and a maximum features limit of 50 per GetFeature request. The task requires saving GetCapabilities and GetFeature response files to the user's home directory. All metadata values match the explicit requirements in the task description.
